issue_summary: FastMath is not an exact replacement for StrictMath Add missing methods - TODO implement our own versions Document which methods are additional to StrictMath
javadoc_before:
/**
 * Faster, more accurate, portable alternative to StrictMath.
 * @version $Revision$ $Date$
 * @since 2.2
 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Faster, more accurate, portable alternative to StrictMath. *

* Additionally implements the following methods: *

    *
  • {@link #asinh(double)}
    • *
  • {@link #acosh(double)}
    • *
  • {@link #atanh(double)}
    • *
  • {@link #nextAfter(float,float)}
    • *
  • {@link #nextAfter(double,double)}
    • *
  • {@link #nextUp(double)}
    • *
  • {@link #nextUp(float)}
    • *
* @version $Revision$ $Date$ * @since 2.2 */
